SilkPage User Guide

SilkPageDocumentation
docbook.xsl.home
Prev  1.2. DocBook Parameters  Next

Name

docbook.xsl.home — Docbook XSL Stylesheets installation directory.

Synopsis

    docbook.xsl.home=fullpath

Description

Specifies the installation directory of the DocBook XSL Stylesheets. This should be a fully qualified path.
